Appearances:
Plaintiff Mahendra A. Arvind is present.
David G. Mendez representing the plaintiff.

Defendants Jack Cline and Sharon Jamison are present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
